title: On-farm research farming systems research program five-year report 1978-83
abstract:
On-farm research is the vital link between the experiment station and the farmer and is an important step in the 
process of developing improved relevant farm practices. On-farm research is a multidisciplinary process, directed at
problem-solving field experimentation. Through each farm situation is unique in itself, similar factors, farms and 
regions can be grouped into operational areas and practices can be tested for dissemination to analogous systems and 
situation.
